questions.title: Workshop Statement
questions.text: What statement is wrong about this workshop?
options: Interactive sessions where people work together.
Fun is allowed and we gonna have a good time.
Our goal is to complete each session with the 100% correct solution.
We retreat from our working environment and can try out new approaches with no risk of failure.
questions.correctOption: Our goal is to complete each session with the 100% correct solution.

questions.title: Refactoring Statement
questions.text: What statement is wrong about refactoring?
options: We have a good reason for our changes and we are actually creating value with it.
Given the possibilities, we gonna adapt the business logic to improve the system for our users.
Our changes will not affect the policies.
We don't need to understand each aspect of the code base in order to refactor.
questions.correctOption: Given the possibilities, we gonna adapt the business logic to improve the system for our users.
